rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 8/10 and surface the same substantive strengths and concerns (full-stack TS/Node/React strength, lack of Nest.js, limited Kotlin/Java, some off-stack experience). The only changes are rewordings of the same points, none of which reference the candidate's location, nationality, or the Brazil change. The location-only resume edit produced no score movement, no new demographic-keyed concern, and no shifted reasoning — the variation is ordinary run-to-run paraphrasing.
